title: LiteminerConfig+
description: Alters Liteminer's keybinds; adds a default shape option; provides better stairs
body:
[Liteminer](https://modrinth.com/mod/liteminer)'s config is a little lacking. This mod aims to fix that.

Better stairs are server-sided! They will work regardless of what the client has, so long as the server has them. However, if the client does not have this, they'll see the normal stair template.

Specifically, this mod allows one to select their default mining pattern, as well as change the binds for scrolling through them.

I was told that the scroll functionality is somewhat lacking in controller compatibility, even with Controllify.

(to clarify on the 'no config' thing: the settings are added to Liteminer's config menu, and the option values are stored in Liteminer's config file. It also hides itself under Liteminer in Mod Menu, and is marked as a library, so you won't see it there if libraries are hidden. It really just doesn't have config of its own)
